title: Medium Silly
description: A resource pack that makes minecraft mobs just a little more silly and unique
body:
# Medium Silly
Work in progress resource pack by kawaz to make mobs look a little more silly and unique while keeping the vanilla minecraft feel!

# REQUIRES OPTIFINE OR EMT+EFT TO WORK!
The entities have been altered using Optifine customs entity models (CEM) and need Optifine to properly work!
The alternative is using both Entity Model Features and Entity Texture Features


<details>
<summary>★ List of changed monsters</summary>
  
- Blaze - sillier face, a smoother texture and a new haircut

- Creeper - smoother texture that matches the modern leaves
  
- Enderman - smoother and darker texture with a rib design, and small (cuter) eyes
  
- Ghast - sad little face
  
- Ravager - a bit less uncanny with small eyes and 3D ears
  
- Slime - a bit smoother inner texture
  
- Squid - smoother textures and little eyes
  
- Glow squid - same as the squid but it glows (but not really :/)
  
- Dragon - smaller eyes and 3D ears with slight adjustement to wings texture
  
- Zombie - crooked eyes and exposed brain (but no blood!) as well as more detailed clothing
  
- Husk - face that matches the zombie with slight adjustment to clothing
  
- Drowned - face that matches the zombie with slight adjustement to kelp on it's head
  
- Skeleton - sillier face and slight texture changes
  
- Stray - face and texture that matches the skeleton with slight adjustment to clothing
  
- Bogged - face and texture that matches the skeleton
  
- Wither skeleton - face and texture that matches the skeleton
  
- Wither - face that matches the skeleton and it's own texture adjustements
  
- Spider - 3D fangs(?) and a cuter face
  
- Cave spider - the same but cave spider

![spiders with smaller eyes in a dark cave](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a6653f3275b4890e1c8a6b108486235ed53359b6_0.webp)
</details>


<details>
<summary>★ List of changed animals</summary>
  
- Chicken - brand new haircut (comb) and a little tail
  
- Cow - small eyes, 3D snout and ears, adjusted horns and a little tail, as well as a smoother texture
  
- Pig - small eyes, 3D ears and adjusted tail
  
- Sheep- smaller eyes and 3D snout and ears

  ![changed sheep and a pig in a birch forest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5c030753ffd3a37fad7f36f754b0a3ff8fabe11a_0.webp)
</details>
